title: BossBarScale
description: Resize the boss bar with an easy in-game slider.
body:
# BossBarScale
This is a Fabric mod that allows players to scale boss bars without changing the GUI scale. Customize the size of boss bars to your liking without affecting other UI elements.

## Installation
Download the JAR from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/bossbarscale) and install the dependencies.

## Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (optional)

## Usage
1. Make sure all dependencies are installed.
2. Open the config screen via ModMenu (skip for default, x0.75).
3. Adjust the boss bar scale settings to your preference (skip for default, x0.75).
4. Press Save Changes and then Done to apply the settings (skip for default, x0.75).
5. Enjoy your customized boss bar sizes!

If you encounter any issues, message me on Discord @escyth.
